Usage:
  circleci completion uninstall [flags]

Examples:
# Remove completion
$ circleci completion uninstall

# Then reload your shell
$ source ~/.zshrc

# Check whether completion is currently installed
$ grep -l "circleci shell completion" ~/.zshrc ~/.bashrc 2>/dev/null


Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected
